creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

To submitter:  It appears that something has gone wrong with 
your checkout of the source code: /usr/src/sys/dev/random/randomdev.c 
and /usr/src/sys/dev/random/randomdev_soft.c should both exist. 
Can you try re-updating your source code, maybe from a different 
cvsup server, and trying again?  If you still have problems, please 
use either the freebsd-questions@ or freebsd-stable@ mailing list -  
the PR database is for bugs IN FreeBSD, and not for problems with it.  Also, 
if this is a genuine build problem, it is more likely to be fixed  
quicker by bringing it to the attention of a mailing list.
